scene_description: A microwave oven and bottles are resting on a kitchen counter beneath illuminated under-cabinet lighting.

candidates.rationale: The microwave display shows a clock time, indicating it is in standby mode rather than actively running.
The light fixture is clearly illuminated and casting light onto the counter below.

scene_description: A dark dining or living area with a round table covered in various objects, including a laptop and drinks.

candidates.rationale: The laptop screen and keyboard are pressed together, indicating it is shut.
The inside surface of the mug is clearly visible, showing no contents.

scene_description: A kitchen counter shows an open microwave, an open oven with items on its door, and an open dishwasher.

candidates.rationale: The microwave door is visibly swung upwards, exposing the interior cavity.
The oven door is pulled down and resting horizontally, clearly not closed.

scene_description: A view of a kitchen countertop showing a closed laptop, a mug with a pen, and cabinets below.

candidates.rationale: The laptop screen and keyboard sections are folded together, indicating it is closed.
A pen is visibly placed inside the mug, so the mug is not empty.

scene_description: A person uses metal tongs to hold a small wooden piece next to a wooden shape sorter toy box.

candidates.target_object: Center drawer of the wooden toy box
candidates.rationale: The drawer is visibly pulled out from the main body of the toy box.
The jaws of the metal tongs are visibly clamped around a small, round wooden piece.

scene_description: A person is holding a stack of Jenga blocks on a white table in front of a white sofa with pillows.

candidates.rationale: The stack of wooden blocks is built upright and has not collapsed.
The screen of the electronic device is dark, indicating it is currently off or asleep.

scene_description: A group of toy food cans and an orange juice carton are resting on a dark table.

candidates.rationale: The gray lid on the can has a simulated pull-tab visibly lifted, indicating an opened state.
The juice carton is fully sealed and shows no visible signs of having been opened or punctured.

scene_description: Three items, including a soda can, a plastic bottle, and a snack bag, are resting on a gray table.

candidates.rationale: The pull tab is lifted and the opening on the top of the can is clearly visible.
The top edge of the bag is crumpled and appears torn open, indicating the contents are accessible.

scene_description: A desk surface displays packaged snacks next to a black desk unit with a partially opened drawer.

candidates.rationale: The drawer is visibly pulled out from the desk unit and is not fully retracted.

candidates.target_object: one of the red snack packages
candidates.rationale: The wrapper of the snack package is intact and shows no signs of being opened or torn.

scene_description: An overhead view of a kitchen sink and counter area where a person is preparing food.

candidates.rationale: The plant on the left side of the sink is visibly contained within a pot or vase.
The cutting board has pieces of food (white vegetables) actively resting on it, indicating it is currently in use and not clean.

scene_description: A kitchen counter features several packaged food items, and the lower rack of a dishwasher is pulled out.

candidates.rationale: The lower rack is extended outward from the dishwasher cavity, indicating it is pulled out.
The top flaps of the Cheez-It box are visibly closed and appear factory-sealed.

scene_description: A robot arm views several objects, including a stuffed animal, a plastic bag, and small containers, resting on a white table.

candidates.rationale: The plastic bag is visibly crumpled open, allowing access to the object inside.
The stuffed animal is lying down flat on the table surface, not standing.

scene_description: Various objects, including cables, electronics, a bowl, and a marker, are placed on a desk next to a robot, with an open box on the floor.

candidates.rationale: The flaps of the cardboard box are unfolded and standing upright, indicating the box is open.
The bowl visibly contains a liquid or substance, meaning it is not empty.

scene_description: A collection of various packaged grocery items, including cans, boxes, and cartons, are displayed on a red cloth covering a table.

candidates.rationale: The can's pull-tab lid is intact and sealed, indicating it has not been opened.
The interior of the mug is clearly visible and contains no liquid or solid contents.

scene_description: A cluttered oval table holds various electronic devices, cables, and office supplies.

candidates.rationale: The screen of the tablet device is illuminated and displaying information.
There are several blue pens visible inside the black pencil holder/tray.

scene_description: A kitchen counter, sink, and open cabinet are visible, with various groceries and appliances present.

candidates.rationale: The door on the right upper cabinet is visibly swung open, revealing items stored inside.
The lower rack of the dishwasher is visible beneath the counter, indicating the door is open.

scene_description: A kitchen scene features a microwave oven with an open door, a television above it, and a partially loaded dishwasher rack pulled out.

candidates.rationale: The microwave door is visibly swung open to the left side of the appliance.
The upper cabinet door is flush with the cabinet frame, indicating it is closed.

scene_description: A kitchen counter with various food items and an open drawer of utensils next to an open refrigerator.

candidates.rationale: The interior shelves and contents of the refrigerator are clearly visible, indicating the door is open.
The plastic cap on the top of the milk carton appears tightly closed and sealed.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items is displayed on a black shelf, with some items placed inside a partially opened drawer below.

candidates.rationale: The drawer is visibly pulled out from the shelf unit, revealing the contents inside.
The metal lid on the can of Green Beans is intact and attached, indicating it has not been opened.

scene_description: A collection of toy food containers is scattered across a dark surface near a window.

candidates.rationale: The metal lid is visibly placed on top of the blue and red soup can.
The white dispensing cap is securely attached to the top of the red ketchup bottle.
